Lab Portal

Our Service Architecture

Transparent, formula-based pricing. No hidden fees. We calculate costs based on wholesale part prices plus professional mobile labor overhead.

Tier 1

Core Power & Port Restoration

Fixed-price minor repairs focusing on power delivery.

Estimated Baseline
$69 - $97
Includes: Batteries, Charging Ports
Tier 2

Elite Display Renewal

Fixed-price major repairs for cracked or failing screens.

Estimated Baseline
From $139
Includes: iPhone 12-15, Galaxy S Series Screens
Tier 3

Specialized Diagnostics

Motherboard surgery, data recovery, and micro-soldering.

Estimated Baseline
Custom Quote
Includes: Liquid Damage, Board-Level Shorts, Cameras
Display & Cell Pros LLC

Spokane's premier mobile technical service laboratory. Combat-veteran owned, operating in strict compliance with Washington State's Right to Repair laws.

Fully Insured, Bonded & Certified
